description: The Rebels Motorcycle Club is an Australian outlaw motorcycle club founded in 1969 by Clint Jacks in Brisbane, Queensland. At its peak, it was the largest motorcycle club in Australia with over 70 chapters and 1,000 members. The club is involved in drug trafficking, arms dealing, extortion, and other criminal activities, and is considered a criminal organization by Australian authorities.
